Welcome to Circle of Friends Animal Shelter

Where our mission is to enrich the lives of pets through healing, education, and connecting companions. We are dedicated to providing a safe and nurturing environment for animals in need, and we strive to give them the best possible chance for a happy and healthy future.

Whether you’re looking to adopt a new furry friend or simply want to support our efforts, we’re here to help. We have a variety of adoptable animals that are waiting to meet their forever families. Browse our selection of pets and find the perfect companion for you and your family.

Thank you for choosing to support Circle of Friends Animal Shelter, together we can make a difference in the lives of these loving animals.
